metadata.name: block_time_forwarder
metadata.description: Example forwarder program for time comparison

instructions.name: forward_call
docs: Sets return data to a single byte: LT(0), EQ(1), or GT(2) comparing the
expected unix timestamp (`input` as i64 LE) against the current clock.

errors.name: InvalidInput
errors.msg: Invalid input: expected 8 bytes for timestamp
